# IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements - WHO Immunization Implementation Guide v0.2.0

* **IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements**

## Library: IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements 

| | |
| :--- | :--- |
| *Official URL*:http://smart.who.int/immunizations/Library/IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements | *Version*:0.2.0 |
| Draft as of 2026-03-24 | *Computable Name*:IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements |

 
This library defines encounter-based elements for Polio used throughout the Immunization CPG 

* * **Content: **application/elm+xml: ````Encoded data (200480 characters)````: **Id: **
  * ?: IMMZD2DTPolioEncounterElements
